seasons.description: The current PUBG ranked season launched with Update 40.1, adding a new ranked leaderboard reset, season rewards, and season-based ranked map service updates.
Ranked Season 39 launched with Update 39.1, bringing a fresh leaderboard reset, new ranked rewards, and a season-based ranked rotation refresh.
Ranked Season 38 began with Update 38.1 and continued PUBG's ranked seasonal structure with leaderboard resets, seasonal rewards, and ranked queue adjustments.
